text: the gender reveal cannon set the neighbors fence on fire and now were not invited to block parties anymore
my MIL suggested we name the baby Gertrude. i said id rather eat glass
3am pickles dipped in nutella hits different when youre 7 months pregant
sleep training night 4. the baby is fine. im the one crying in the hallway
diaper blowout in target. up the back, in the carseat, on my last clean shirt. we just left the cart there
daycare costs more than my mortgage and they still send him home covered in paint
told my MIL she cant just show up unannounced anymore and you'd think i committed a felony
i drive a minivan now and honestly? the automatic doors slap. i am converted
my 3yo is a juice box sommelier. he can tell the difference between apple and apple-pear by smell alone
playground moms formed an actual clique and they have a group chat i wasnt invited to lol
gender reveal balloon popped early at the restaurant. waiter knew before we did
husband wants to name our son Optimus and hes not joking. divorce papers loading
currently eating cold spaghetti over the sink at 2am. pregnancy is glamorous
ferber method worked in 3 nights but at what cost. i aged 10 years
blowout so bad we threw away the onesie in the mcdonalds bathroom. no regrets
just did the math and daycare for two kids is $3200/month. cool cool cool cool
MIL rearranged my entire kitchen while i was at the hospital giving birth
the minivan has a built in vacuum. A VACUUM. why did nobody tell me sooner
my toddler rejected the organic juice and only wants the gas station brand. raising a connoisseur
the sandbox is a warzone. saw two moms almost throw hands over whose kid threw sand first
gender reveal party used the wrong color confetti. everyone thought it was a girl for 20 min
wife wants Luna, i want literally anything else. weve been arguing for 6 months
i cried because the grocery store was out of a very specific cheese. hormones are wild
tried cry it out for one night. neighbors called to check on us
the diaper held NOTHING. it was decorative at best. just vibes
spending $1800/mo on daycare and my kid learned to bite other children there
my mother in law bought a crib for her house without asking. we visit twice a year
i used to judge minivan parents. now i have heated seats and 47 cupholders. karma
the kid ranks juice boxes on a 10 point scale. hes four
got iced out of the playground bench by the PTA moms bc i brought store bought snacks
our gender reveal was a cake. the baker made it brown inside. BROWN. what does that mean
we agreed on the name Oliver then my wife heard it at target 3 times and now its ruined
currently craving dish soap smell. not eating it just... deeply enjoying the aroma at 34 weeks
baby slept 6 hours straight last night. i still woke up every 45 min to check if she was breathing
blowout on an airplane. row 14. everyone in rows 12-16 knew. nowhere to hide
daycare raised prices again. at this point just let me bring my baby to work
FIL keeps calling the baby by the wrong name on purpose bc he wanted a different one
the sliding doors on the minivan changed my life and i will not be taking questions
my kid did a blind juice box tasting at his bday party. ranked them all. im proud and scared
there is a mom at the park who tracks whose kid uses the good swing. she has a spreadsheet
pink smoke grenade at the reveal went off in the car. everything is pink now. EVERYTHING
SIL named her baby the name we had picked. she knew. she KNEW
ate an entire jar of olives for dinner. baby wants what baby wants
yall the taking cara babies program costs HOW MUCH for a pdf
the blowout reached his HAIR. how does physics even allow that
nanny share fell apart bc the other family wants only organic snacks and screen-free everything
MIL posted the gender on facebook before we could announce. she is blocked now
i will accept my minivan fate when they pry my sedan keys from my cold dead hands. update: i love the van
he wont drink apple juice from the green box. only the red box. theyre the same juice. SAME JUICE
the alpha mom at daycare dropoff intimidates me and i am a grown adult with a mortgage
tannerite gender reveal cracked the foundation of the shed. its a boy tho
husband suggested Streetlamp for a name after some reddit post. i married this person
pickles and ice cream is a cliche but its a cliche for a REASON ok
sleep consultant said put the baby down drowsy but awake. mine only does screaming or unconscious
triple blowout day. went through every outfit in the diaper bag by noon
paying $2400/mo for daycare and they just told me theyre closed all of august
my MIL keeps sneaking the baby rice cereal even tho the pediatrician said no
the stow-n-go seats in the van mean i can fit a whole costco run. this is my life now
found my kid ranking capri suns by mouthfeel. hes got opinions
the parents who hog the baby swings for 30 min are a menace to society
alligator at the gender reveal was not the move. yes this happened. florida
we cant agree on a middle name so the birth certificate just says his first and last. oops
woke up at 4am and ate leftover pad thai standing in the fridge light. 32 weeks
CIO night 7. he cried for 3 min then slept 11 hours. i cried for 45 min
blowout in the ergo carrier. on me. it was on ME. i am the diaper now
just found out the fancy montessori daycare has a 2 YEAR waitlist lmaooo
in laws showed up with a drum set for a 1 year old. this is warfare
finally test drove a minivan and now im looking at my SUV like its a stranger
this kid can identify juice brand by the shape of the straw hole. we need to go outside more
the judgement from other parents when you pull out a screen at the playground. mind ur business carol
they dyed the family dog blue for the gender reveal. the dog is white. WAS white
grandma keeps suggesting old timey names like Mildred and Ethel with a straight face
craving the smell of gasoline and fresh tennis balls. pregnancy is so weird
hired a sleep consultant for $400 and her advice was basically a free blog post i already read
blowout in the jumperoo. poop was LAUNCHED. the trajectory was impressive honestly
daycare germs are undefeated. weve been sick for 6 months straight no exaggeration
MIL gave unsolicited parenting advice so i started giving her unsolicited tech support
the honda odyssey chose me. i did not choose it. but here we are thriving
organic apple juice vs regular. my kid chose the one with paw patrol on it. brand loyalty
overheard playground drama about which kid gets to be the leader of the stick collection
confetti cannon at the reveal shot directly into the photographers face. got great photos tho
vetoed the name Braxxtyn. with two xs. my wife was serious. i am concerned
ate a lemon like an apple today. just bit right into it. the baby has taken over my body
white noise machine broke at 3am and i have never moved faster in my life
simultaneous blowout from twins. this is my joker origin story
montessori daycare wants us to bring a specific type of wooden spoon from japan. its $45. for a spoon
set a boundary with my mom about kissing the baby and she didnt talk to me for 2 weeks
traded my mustang for a sienna. moment of silence please
the juice box hierarchy at preschool is intense. apple is common, grape is currency
saw a dad get exiled from the sandbox area for letting his kid dig too aggressively. rules are rules
our gender reveal was a simple text to the family and honestly? 10/10 recommend
mother wants us to name baby after her. her name is Berthilda. i love you mom but no
ranch dressing on everything. cereal. fruit. i put ranch on a brownie yesterday no shame
the 4 month sleep regression is not a regression its a lifestyle change
diaper bag packed for every scenario. blowout happened in the one place i didnt plan for
waitlist for daycare so long my kid might age out before getting a spot
FIL keeps buying loud toys. we keep losing the batteries. funny how that works
minivan backup camera saved me from running over 4 scooters and a tricycle today alone
the preschool juice box trade market crashed when someone brought coconut water. chaos
helicopter parent at the playground followed her kid up the slide. the kid is seven
baby arrived before we picked a name. she was Baby Girl lastname for 3 days at the hospital
